# glossary-service — route-coverage exemptions (D-GLOSSARY-CONTRACT-FIRST).
# GENERATED by REGEN_ROUTE_ALLOWLIST=1 go test -run TestOpenAPIRouteConformance.
# Each line: <method> <normalized /v1 path>. "# backfill" = undocumented /v1
# route awaiting an OpenAPI entry (the shrinking debt); document it in
# contracts/api/glossary-service/ then regenerate to remove it. "# permanent: <reason>"
# = a /v1 route that legitimately never gets a public contract entry (rare);
# set it by hand — regen PRESERVES an existing class for a still-present route.
